findings.description: The knowledge file adds two columns — 「型」(Type) with values 'String' and 'List', and 「必須」(Required) with '○' marks — that do not exist in the source table. The source table has only three columns: 設定項目名, 説明, and デフォルト値. The type and required information is entirely invented.
findings.source_evidence: Source table headers: 設定項目名 / 説明 / デフォルト値 (3 columns only). Knowledge file table headers: プロパティ名 / 型 / 必須 / デフォルト値 / 説明 (5 columns, with fabricated 型 and 必須 columns).
